label: satisfied

meta.business_goal: Cover Decision + Generation System dataset calibration

negative_constraints: Do not imply or identify specific people.
Do not depend on exact tiny booth text for meaning.
Avoid generic stock-photo emptiness; the booth should look active and documentary-like.
Avoid excessive decorative effects that make the headline unreadable.

reusable_prompt_signals: central real exhibition booth photo with glowing border
several visitors gathered at booth demonstration
large white brush-script Chinese headline in lower third
headline phrase about exhibition现场 and machine receiving attention
violet light streaks and futuristic motion accents
high contrast documentary plus promotional poster style
risk_notes: Compressed image limits reliable reading of small booth text.
Exact organization names and product claims should be treated as visual text only unless separately verified.
When regenerating, avoid facial identity emphasis and keep people as anonymous exhibition attendees.
